title: Prospect of Chinese stimulus measures pushes metals higher
section_path: Prospect of Chinese stimulus measures pushes metals higher
section_path_text: Prospect of Chinese stimulus measures pushes metals higher
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Positive economic data and prospects of stimulus measures in China boosted sentiment across commodity markets. That was mitigated somewhat by concerns of further monetary tightening. Base metal rallied amid an improving outlook for demand in China.
